Des_en: 1 Round  Preparation Time,ATK 3 Enemy Troops(DMG Coefficient 1.0),And Make The Target Enemy Before Each Round,Curse DMG Taken,Lasting For 2～3 Rounds

Name: {助燃}
Des: {在前4回合},{使3个敌方部队},{受到咒术伤害或燃烧伤害时},{有几率} {使受到咒术或燃烧伤害}*1.5
Des_en: In The First 4 Rounds,Make 3 Of Enemy Troops,When taking Curse or Burning DMG,A Chance to Make Curse or Burning DMG Taken*1.5

Name: {元素爆炸}
Des:
{自身部队},{攻击有战术燃烧或咒术状态的敌人时},{有几率} {立即按1.3倍结算所有剩余燃烧伤害和咒术伤害},{燃烧和咒术效果移除}
({效果触发概率},{多段攻击只判定首次})
Des_en:
Own Troop,When attacking an enemy with Tactical Burning or Curse status,A Chance to Immediately settle all remaining Burning and Curse DMG at 1.3x,Burning and Curse effects are removed
(Effect Trigger Probability,Multi-Stage Attack only triggers on the first hit)

Name: {奥数增幅}
Des: {在前3回合},{使2个我方部队},{速度属性提高} 11.4({受防御属性影响}),{并且} {发动追击技能时},{有几率} {溅射其他敌人}({伤害系数} 0.60)
Des_en: In The First 3 Rounds,Make 2 Of our Troops,Spd Attribute Increased 11.4(Affected By DEF Attribute),And When Launching Pursuit Skills,A Chance to Splash On Other Enemies(DMG Coefficient 0.60)

Name: {声东击西}
Des: {普通攻击时},{无论攻击目标是谁},{对敌方统帅发起追击}
Des_en: When ATK Normally,Regardless of the attack target,Launch a pursuit on the enemy Commander

Name: {弱点击破}
Des: {发动追击技能时},{有几率} {溅射其他敌人}({伤害系数} 0.60)
Des_en: When Launching Pursuit Skills,A Chance to Splash On Other Enemies(DMG Coefficient 0.60)

Name: {夜舞倾城}
Des: {在前4回合},{使2个我方部队},{攻击属性提高} 11.4({受防御属性影响}),{并且} {在发动攻击行为时},{有几率} {无视闪避和护盾},{无视兵种克制效果}
Des_en: In The First 4 Rounds,Make 2 Of our Troops,ATK Attribute Increased 11.4(Affected By DEF Attribute),And When launching ATK,A Chance to Ignores Dodge and Shield,Ignores Soldier Restraint effects

Name: {真视领域}
Des: {在前3回合},{使2个我方部队},{造成真实伤害提高}({受速度属性影响})
Des_en: In The First 3 Rounds,Make 2 Of our Troops,Real DMG Dealt Increased(Affected By Spd Attribute)

Name: {攻防转换}
Des: {自身部队},{攻击属性提高} 11.4({受防御属性影响}),{并且} {在发动攻击行为时},{有几率} {无视闪避和护盾},{无视兵种克制效果}
Des_en: Own Troop,ATK Attribute Increased 11.4(Affected By DEF Attribute),And When launching ATK,A Chance to Ignores Dodge and Shield,Ignores Soldier Restraint effects
